CVE-2024-0911.title: A flaw was found in indent, a program for formatting C code. This ...
CVE-2024-0911.description: A flaw was found in indent, a program for formatting C code. This issue may allow an attacker to trick a user into processing a specially crafted file to trigger a heap-based buffer overflow, causing the application to crash.
